vocab.example: Team sports are immensely popular because they tap into the communal spirit that is so central to our traditional values.

vocab.meaning: năng lực/kỹ năng thể thao xuất sắc
vocab.example: Local tournaments are a great platform for young athletes to showcase their sporting prowess and gain recognition.

vocab.meaning: thúc đẩy sự gắn kết xã hội
vocab.example: Football acts as a powerful tool to foster social cohesion, bringing people from diverse backgrounds together under one banner.

vocab.meaning: bầu không khí cổ vũ cuồng nhiệt (với sự ủng hộ mạnh mẽ cho một đội)
vocab.example: Basketball matches often generate a partisan atmosphere in the stadium, with fans chanting fervently for their home team.

vocab.meaning: mức độ phong trào/cấp cơ sở
vocab.example: To maintain the popularity of volleyball, the government has invested heavily in facilities at the grassroots level.

vocab.meaning: vinh quang và uy tín/danh tiếng
vocab.example: Winning a regional championship brings immense glory and prestige not just to the players, but to their entire hometown.

vocab.meaning: rèn luyện/thấm nhuần tính kỷ luật
vocab.example: Many parents encourage their children to play team sports to instill discipline and a sense of responsibility from a young age.

vocab.meaning: những môn thể thao thu hút nhiều khán giả
vocab.example: While individual gym workouts are rising, team-based spectator sports still dominate the television ratings every weekend.

vocab.meaning: xóa nhòa khoảng cách thế hệ
vocab.example: Watching the national team play is a rare occasion that can bridge the generational gap, as grandparents and grandchildren cheer together.
The dream of securing an athletic scholarship drives many students to excel in competitive team sports during high school.
